ariaGame.name: Game region label
ariaGame.description: Screen-reader label for the whole play area; explains the goal and the fly-to-steer, auto-fire controls plus the Tab screen-reader target mode.

start.name: Start prompt
start.description: Overlay prompt shown before the first launch, telling the visitor that movement flies and aims, the swarm must be swept and dodged, and any input launches.

hudWave.name: HUD wave counter
hudWave.description: HUD label showing the current wave number.

hudScore.name: HUD score counter
hudScore.description: HUD label showing the current score.

hudShield.name: HUD shield counter
hudShield.description: HUD label showing the remaining shield strength.

announceWave.name: Announcer: wave start
announceWave.description: Live-region message when a new wave begins, with the wave number and how many drones are coming.

announceShield.name: Announcer: shield remaining
announceShield.description: Live-region message after a hit, with the remaining shield strength.

announceTarget.name: Announcer: targeted drone
announceTarget.description: Live-region message read when the screen-reader user presses Tab to target a drone; states the drone kind and its clock-position bearing. {kind} is filled with a localized drone-kind name, {clock} with the localized clock-position string.

announceNoTarget.name: Announcer: target destroyed
announceNoTarget.description: Live-region message read when the currently targeted drone is destroyed and no new one is auto-selected; prompts the user to press Tab for the next drone.

announceWin.name: Announcer: verified
announceWin.description: Live-region message when every wave is cleared and the captcha is satisfied.

announceLose.name: Announcer: round over
announceLose.description: Live-region message when the shield is depleted and the round ends.

kindChaser.name: Drone kind: Chaser
kindChaser.description: Name of the chaser drone, read in the targeting announcement; fills {kind} in announceTarget.

kindWeaver.name: Drone kind: Weaver
kindWeaver.description: Name of the weaver drone, read in the targeting announcement; fills {kind} in announceTarget.

kindSplitter.name: Drone kind: Splitter
kindSplitter.description: Name of the splitter drone, read in the targeting announcement; fills {kind} in announceTarget.

oclock.name: Clock-position bearing
oclock.description: A 12-hour clock-position bearing for a targeted drone (12 is straight ahead, away from the camera); fills {clock} in announceTarget. {n} is the hour (1 to 12).

win.name: Verified screen title
win.description: End-screen headline shown when all waves are cleared and the captcha is satisfied.

lose.name: Round over title
lose.description: End-screen headline shown when the shield is depleted.

mute.name: Mute button
mute.description: Label/aria-label for the control that mutes game audio.

unmute.name: Unmute button
unmute.description: Label/aria-label for the control that unmutes game audio.

a11yHint.name: Screen-reader targeting hint
a11yHint.description: Short hint, surfaced to assistive tech, that pressing Tab targets the next drone.

English.ariaGame: Voidshot arena shooter. Fly your gunship toward the cursor to steer and aim; the guns fire forward automatically. Sweep the fire across the drone swarm while dodging, and clear every wave before your shield is gone. Screen reader: press Tab to target the next drone and your ship engages it.
English.start: Move to fly and aim, sweep the swarm, and dodge. Tap or press a key to launch.
English.announceNoTarget: Target destroyed. Press Tab for the next drone.

Chinese (Simplified).ariaGame: Voidshot 竞技场射击。驾驶炮艇朝光标飞行来转向和瞄准，炮火会自动向前射击。一边躲避一边横扫无人机群，在护盾耗尽前清除每一波。屏幕阅读器：按 Tab 锁定下一架无人机，你的战机会自动攻击它。
Chinese (Simplified).start: 移动来飞行和瞄准，横扫机群并躲避。点击或按任意键发射。
Chinese (Simplified).announceWave: 第 {n} 波：{count} 架无人机来袭
Chinese (Simplified).announceNoTarget: 目标已摧毁。按 Tab 锁定下一架无人机。
Chinese (Simplified).announceWin: 已通过。所有波次已清除。
Chinese (Simplified).a11yHint: 按 Tab 锁定下一架无人机

Spanish.ariaGame: Voidshot, disparos en arena. Pilota tu cañonera hacia el cursor para girar y apuntar; los cañones disparan al frente automáticamente. Barre el fuego sobre el enjambre de drones mientras esquivas y despeja cada oleada antes de quedarte sin escudo. Lector de pantalla: pulsa Tab para fijar el siguiente dron y tu nave lo ataca.
Spanish.start: Muévete para volar y apuntar, barre el enjambre y esquiva. Toca o pulsa una tecla para despegar.
Spanish.announceNoTarget: Objetivo destruido. Pulsa Tab para el siguiente dron.

Arabic.ariaGame: Voidshot، إطلاق نار في الساحة. حلّق بمركبتك المسلّحة نحو المؤشر للتوجيه والتصويب؛ المدافع تطلق النار إلى الأمام تلقائيًا. اكتسح النيران فوق سرب الطائرات المسيّرة وأنت تراوغ، وأنهِ كل موجة قبل أن ينفد درعك. لقارئ الشاشة: اضغط Tab لاستهداف الطائرة التالية فتشتبك بها مركبتك.
Arabic.start: تحرّك لتطير وتصوّب، اكتسح السرب وراوغ. انقر أو اضغط أي مفتاح للانطلاق.
Arabic.announceNoTarget: تم تدمير الهدف. اضغط Tab للطائرة التالية.
Arabic.announceWin: تم التحقق. تم إنهاء كل الموجات.

Portuguese.ariaGame: Voidshot, tiro em arena. Pilote sua canhoneira em direção ao cursor para virar e mirar; os canhões disparam para a frente automaticamente. Varra o fogo sobre o enxame de drones enquanto desvia e limpe cada onda antes que seu escudo acabe. Leitor de tela: pressione Tab para mirar o próximo drone e sua nave o ataca.
Portuguese.start: Mova-se para voar e mirar, varra o enxame e desvie. Toque ou pressione uma tecla para decolar.
Portuguese.announceNoTarget: Alvo destruído. Pressione Tab para o próximo drone.

French.ariaGame: Voidshot, tir en arène. Pilotez votre canonnière vers le curseur pour diriger et viser; les canons tirent devant automatiquement. Balayez le feu sur l'essaim de drones en esquivant et éliminez chaque vague avant l'épuisement de votre bouclier. Lecteur d'écran: appuyez sur Tab pour cibler le prochain drone et votre vaisseau l'engage.
French.start: Déplacez-vous pour voler et viser, balayez l'essaim et esquivez. Touchez ou appuyez sur une touche pour décoller.
French.announceNoTarget: Cible détruite. Appuyez sur Tab pour le prochain drone.

German.ariaGame: Voidshot, Arena-Shooter. Steuere dein Kampfschiff zum Mauszeiger, um zu lenken und zu zielen; die Geschütze feuern automatisch nach vorne. Streiche das Feuer über den Drohnenschwarm, während du ausweichst, und räume jede Welle, bevor dein Schild weg ist. Screenreader: Drücke Tab, um die nächste Drohne anzuvisieren, dein Schiff greift sie an.
German.start: Bewege dich zum Fliegen und Zielen, streiche über den Schwarm und weiche aus. Tippe oder drücke eine Taste zum Starten.
German.announceNoTarget: Ziel zerstört. Drücke Tab für die nächste Drohne.
German.a11yHint: Tab visiert die nächste Drohne an

Russian.ariaGame: Voidshot, арена-шутер. Веди боевой корабль к курсору, чтобы поворачивать и целиться; пушки стреляют вперёд автоматически. Веди огонь по рою дронов, уклоняясь, и зачищай каждую волну, пока не иссяк щит. Скринридер: нажмите Tab, чтобы взять на прицел следующий дрон, и корабль атакует его.
Russian.start: Двигайтесь, чтобы лететь и целиться, ведите огонь по рою и уклоняйтесь. Нажмите или любую клавишу для старта.
Russian.announceNoTarget: Цель уничтожена. Нажмите Tab для следующего дрона.

Japanese.ariaGame: Voidshot アリーナシューター。カーソルに向けて自機を飛ばして方向と照準を合わせよう。砲は自動で前方へ発射します。回避しながらドローンの群れに掃射を浴びせ、シールドが尽きる前にすべての波を撃退しよう。スクリーンリーダー：Tab キーで次のドローンをロックオンすると自機が攻撃します。
Japanese.start: 動いて飛びながら照準を合わせ、群れを掃射して回避しよう。タップまたはキーで発進。
Japanese.announceWave: ウェーブ {n}：ドローン {count} 機が接近中
Japanese.announceNoTarget: 目標を撃破。Tab キーで次のドローンへ。
Japanese.announceWin: 認証済み。すべてのウェーブを撃退しました。
Japanese.announceLose: シールドが尽きました。ラウンド終了。
Japanese.a11yHint: Tab で次のドローンをロックオン

Korean.ariaGame: Voidshot 아레나 슈터. 커서를 향해 함선을 몰아 방향을 잡고 조준하세요. 포는 자동으로 정면을 향해 발사됩니다. 회피하면서 드론 무리에 사격을 휩쓸고, 실드가 바닥나기 전에 모든 웨이브를 처치하세요. 스크린 리더: Tab 키를 누르면 다음 드론을 조준하고 함선이 공격합니다.
Korean.start: 이동해 비행하며 조준하고, 무리를 휩쓸며 회피하세요. 탭하거나 키를 눌러 발진하세요.
Korean.announceNoTarget: 목표 격파. Tab 키를 눌러 다음 드론으로.

Indonesian.ariaGame: Voidshot, penembak arena. Terbangkan kapal tempurmu ke arah kursor untuk bermanuver dan membidik; meriam menembak ke depan secara otomatis. Sapukan tembakan ke gerombolan dron sambil mengelak, dan bersihkan setiap gelombang sebelum perisaimu habis. Pembaca layar: tekan Tab untuk membidik dron berikutnya dan kapalmu menyerangnya.
Indonesian.start: Bergeraklah untuk terbang dan membidik, sapu gerombolan, dan mengelak. Ketuk atau tekan tombol untuk meluncur.
Indonesian.announceNoTarget: Target hancur. Tekan Tab untuk dron berikutnya.
